title: Reflection Artifact
description: Workers produce a structured reflection after every task. Reflections are written to the Langfuse trace immediately and batch-written to /coaching/<agent-id>/history.md by the nightly autodream job. Source: AGENT_PRODUCT_CYCLE.md §Reflection Artifacts.

what_i_did.description: 1–2 sentences summarizing what the worker did on this task.

what_i_struggled_with.description: Specific and honest. Vague struggles produce vague coaching.

what_id_do_differently.description: Actionable — concrete behavior change for next time.

confidence_was_accurate.description: Whether the worker's pre-output confidence score matched the actual quality of the output.

coaching_applied.description: Coaching note ID if a coaching note was applied on this task. Null if no coaching was active.

coaching_helped.description: Whether the applied coaching helped. n/a if no coaching was active.
